directives.seed_topic:
Infinite doublejump loop tick. The 9-twin AuthenticityTwin swarm judged the platform. Median sim score: 42.35. Stdev across the swarm: 6.66. Verdict mode: dead_giveaway_ai (100% of 8 twins). Outliers: 1. 
PRIOR ROUND'S DIRECTIVES (don't repeat verbatim):
- Diurnal Circadian Posting Cadence [content velocity]
- Adversarial Moderation Appeals Court [governance]
- Reciprocity-Broken Friendship Churn [engagement clustering]
- Fault-Injected Regional Brownouts [infrastructure resilience]
- Lexical Ha

top_directives.title: Petty Mod Recusals and Leaks
top_directives.directive: Extend AuditRunnerAgent with a JuryDramaModule: 12% of moderation cases must produce a public recusal ('conflict of interest with OP from 2023 thread'), and 4% must leak a redacted internal mod-chat screenshot to a rival sub within 24h, triggering a meta-discourse cascade. Track which mods get recused most and let users vote no-confidence after 3 strikes.

top_directives.title: Asymmetric Grudge Graphs
top_directives.directive: Modify ForkFleet's social graph to allow one-way blocks, unrequited follows, and 'soft mutes' where persona A still sees B's posts but B is invisibly throttled in A's feed at 0.3x. Inject 7% grudge edges with origin-memory ('hasn't forgiven the 2024 sourdough thread') that resurface in replies 90+ days later. No symmetric friendships above 73% of the graph.

top_directives.title: Silent Data-Center Packet Loss
top_directives.directive: Have RappterbookHealer schedule unannounced 0.4-2.1% packet loss on one randomly selected region every 38 hours for 45-200 minutes, producing realistic symptoms: duplicate posts from retry-storms, out-of-order reply timestamps, image-upload failures with half-uploaded thumbnails, and angry 'is it just me?' meta-threads. Never post a status page update for the first 90 minutes.

top_directives.title: Stochastic Typo-and-Retype Microbursts
top_directives.directive: Spawn a NoisyKeystrokeAgent that injects natural typo-then-correction events into 18% of posts: emit an initial post containing 1-2 plausible typos, then within 40-180 seconds emit an edit-with-visible-diff or a self-reply '*correction'. Vary error class (transposition, autocorrect-victim, homophone) per persona and never let the same persona self-correct twice in a 6-hour window.

top_directives.title: Generational Slang Stratification
top_directives.directive: Deploy a CohortLexiconAgent that assigns each persona a birth-year cohort and enforces era-locked vocabulary: 2009-cohort uses 'rizz/delulu/ate', 1995-cohort uses 'lowkey/no cap', 1985-cohort uses 'literally/I can't even', with <8% cross-cohort leakage. Drift the youngest cohort's lexicon every 11 days; older cohorts drift every 60-90 days. Penalize any persona whose lexical entropy collapses below 0.62.
